== Notes for [[Item:Q114408|Q114408]] ==

Fuentes

Arbol genealogico, de la Familia de los Ruizes de Vergara. - o.O., 1659
--------------------
Fuente

http://geneall.net/es/name/1235308/sancho-fortuniones-duque-en-navarra-senor-de-las-torres-amezcua-aznar-y-barzuna/

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
